---
title: "Homework03"
format: html
editor: visual
---
## 1. Set Up
```{r}
#| label: Set Up
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
salinity <- read_csv(
  here(
    "data",
    "salinity-pickleweed.csv"
  ))
my_data <- read_csv(
  here(
    "data",
    "my_data Sheet2.csv"
  ))
```



[html link](https://samarx27.github.io/ENVS-193DS_homework-03/)
